text:
sem         2008-06-16 21:31:38 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    dns/unbound          Makefile 
  Added files:
    dns/unbound/files    patch-configure 
  Log:
  - with USE_OPENSSL, users can choose base OpenSSL or the one in the ports
  - fix configure script so that WITHOUT_LIBEVENT works
  - install some docs
  
  PR:             ports/123853
  Submitted by:   Tomoyuki Sakurai <cherry at trombik.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.6       +15 -1     ports/dns/unbound/Makefile
